blended.narrative: Cypress Mountain is expecting flurries over the next 48 hours with trace amounts. Snow levels around 5,832 ft. Looking ahead, 46 inches possible over the next 14 days. Mild temps with highs near 42°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Tuesday: 3.2" of snow, highs of 32°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Wednesday: 13" of heavy snow, highs of 32°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Friday: 9" of heavy snow, highs of 32°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Saturday: 16" of heavy snow, highs of 30°F. Expect variable conditions.
